series_metadata.series_description: The docket sheet contains the claim numbers, claimant''''''''s names, the date and time of the hearing, comments on settlement negotiations or other related matters pertaining to VSSR (Violation of a Specific Safety Requirement) hearings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: convert document into PDF then shred ; Electronic: retain 1 year from the date of conference, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
